description: Replaced the linear β noise schedule with a cosine schedule (Nichol & Dhariwal 2021), which avoids the abrupt noise level near t=0 that the linear schedule suffers from on small 28×28 images, leading to better training signal distribution and lower MSE loss.

Increased `SmallUNet` default `base_channels` from 16 to 32, doubling the number of filters in every conv layer and ResBlock (~4x parameter count), giving the model more capacity to fit the noise prediction function within the same number of training steps.

Replaced the linear β noise schedule with a cosine schedule (Nichol & Dhariwal, Improved DDPM 2021), which distributes noise levels more smoothly and avoids over-noising at early timesteps on small 28×28 MNIST images, leading to a better training signal and lower MSE loss.

Replaced the constant Adam learning rate with a cosine decay schedule (`optax.cosine_decay_schedule`) starting at `args.lr` and decaying to 0 over all training steps, so the model converges faster within the fixed short training run rather than plateauing at a fixed LR.
